sglang.title: [NSA] Fall back to fast_hadamard_transform when sgl_kernel lacks the symbol
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

On non-HIP / non-SM103 paths, nsa_indexer.rotate_activation does from sgl_kernel import hadamard_transform. Older sgl_kernel builds (e.g. 0.3.21) don't export this symbol, which causes ImportError at forward time and crashes the scheduler. Wrap the import in try/except and fall back to fast

sglang.title: [diffusion] model: Fix FLUX.1/2 graph breaks
sglang.author: avjves
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently two graph breaks significantly reduce the performance of at least FLUX.1 and also somewhat FLUX.2. Other models might be affected as well, but are not tested. This PR fixes the the two graph breaks without changing the model behavior.
Modifications


In case where FlashInfer is

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Restore cache-dit support for LTX2
sglang.author: gjsheu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
I found that LTX2 throws an error when cache-dit is enabled. Reference Issue: #23193. The root cause is that the cache mechanism wraps the blocks, causing them to no longer have the idx attribute. This PR aims to restore cache-dit support for LTX2.
Modifications
sglang\python\sglang\multi

sglang.title: [NPU] Support GGUF quantization for Ascend NPU (dense + MoE)
sglang.author: TheKonka
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Enable GGUF quantized models (e.g., Q4_K_M, Q8_0, Q5_K_M) to run on Ascend NPU hardware. GGUF is a popular format for quantized LLM models, and this PR adds native NPU support with optimized performance.
Modifications

sglang.title: [CI] sgl-kernel: prune dangling images before each wheel build
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
sgl-kernel/build.sh calls docker buildx build --target deps --load -t sgl-kernel-deps:cuda\${CUDA_VERSION}-\${PY_TAG}-\${ARCH} on every run. Because the tag is reused, each successful build retags the new image and orphans the previous one as a dangling <none>:<none> entry (~16-23 GB each).

sglang.title: ci: add docker release workflow for deepseek_v4 branch
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Adds .github/workflows/release-docker-deepseek-v4.yml, a workflow_dispatch workflow that builds the four DeepSeek-V4 Dockerfiles introduced in #23600 from the deepseek_v4 branch and pushes them to Docker Hub.
Single input: repository, defaulting to lmsysorg/sglang-staging. Override to lmsys

sglang.title: [CI] release-docker-deepseek-v4: select which flavors to push
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add four boolean workflow_dispatch inputs to release-docker-deepseek-v4.yml — build_hopper, build_blackwell, build_b300, build_grace_blackwell — all defaulted to true, so the existing "build all four" behavior is preserved when nothing is changed in the dispatch UI.

sglang.title: Fix Qwen3 MoE double-reduce when DP attention + EP + reduce_scatterv (#23729)
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PR #22642 introduced should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv() which fuses the post-MoE all-reduce with the dp_scatter into a single reduce_scatterv inside LayerCommunicator. The qwen2_moe.py forward path was patched to skip the explicit tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce when the fast path is active

vllm.title: [Opt] Optimize deepstack buffer handling for multimodal Qwen3 models
vllm.author: labAxiaoming
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Optimize deepstack buffer handling for multimodal Qwen3 models
﻿
Track valid deepstack token spans with deepstack_input_embeds_num_tokens
so we only fetch and clear deepstack buffers when they contain active
payloads.
﻿
This avoids passing zero-filled deepstack_input_embeds during text-only

Purpose
test_moe_layer is hitting a deadlock on MI300 during execution of the test_moe_layer::test_moe_layer tests which spawn multiple workers for these tests which use TP=2,4. There is a WeakValueDictionary here which caches DeepEP buffers here and when garbage collection runs, these weak referenc

vllm.title: [kv_offload+HMA][11/N]: Support store with multiple KV groups
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR extends the offloading connector to support store (via build_connector_meta) where KVCacheConfig contains multiple groups.
Currently does not support sliding window / SSMs.

Only trim padded routed output before shared+routed add / latent moe up-proj. No-shared MoE keeps late truncation.
Not duplicate: #40853 (draft auto-pr) reverts #40794; this preserves the shared-output fix.

vllm.title: [LoRA] MoE LoRA Refactor
